calendar.matters:
Motion To Enforce Settlement
Off Calendar Mar-08-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2006-4, Motion To Enforce Settlement

No appearance.

The court adopted its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to enforce settlement pursuant to California Code of Civil Procedure 664.6 and enter judgment" is granted.

Counsel for the moving party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed and a proposed judgment.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (302/RBU)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2020 Continued To Oct-24-28 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-06-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-10-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-05-2018 Set For Trial On Jul-09-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
